item.title: As bond investors fret over an AI bubble, what to know — and how to find an opportunity
item.description: For the first time, investors said an AI bubble was their biggest worry, according to a recent Bank of American survey. What the pros are saying.

item.title: U.S.-Iran attacks are putting a spotlight on drone technology. How to invest
item.description: Drones are playing a prominent role in the war between the U.S. and Iran that erupted over the weekend, putting a spotlight on the need for deterrence...

item.title: Investors say 'safest' software play Microsoft looks cheap at current prices
item.description: Two investors told CNBC's "Halftime Report" on Wednesday that they recently added to their positions in Microsoft.

item.title: Broadcom earnings are out after market close. What top analysts are expecting
item.description: Analysts from firms including Morgan Stanley, UBS and JPMorgan are notably bullish on Broadcom's TPU business.

item.title: Respect price over opinion when the S&P 500 range is inside a multi-month 'trading box'
item.description: The benchmark stock index has been testing the lower boundary of its latest trading range — what Nicolas Darvas called a trading box.
